title: How to cancel your subscription and request a refund
content: If our service no longer meets your needs, you can cancel your subscription at any time from the Subscription page in Account Settings. After canceling, you will retain access until the end of your current billing period, after which your plan reverts to the free tier. Depending on your region and how recently you were charged, you may be eligible for a refund. Contact support if you believe you qualify and we will review your request.
